ast.name: error
ast.source: Dataflow already running. Use runAsync() to chain invocations.
ast.target: 数据流已在运行。请使用 runAsync() 来链接调用。

ast.name: error
ast.target: 未找到 DOM 文档实例。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Scale domainMid exceeds domain min or max.
ast.target: 比例尺 domainMid 超出域最小值或最大值。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Ignoring extent with values <= 0 for log regression.
ast.target: 忽略对数回归中值 <= 0 的范围。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Skipping regression with more parameters than data points.
ast.target: 跳过参数多于数据点的回归。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Only call this method for binned field defs.
ast.target: 仅对分箱字段定义调用此方法。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Vega-Lite is a concise high-level language for interactive visualization.
ast.target: Vega-Lite 是一种用于交互式可视化的简洁高级语言。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A bit mask indicating which filters to ignore.
ast.target: 指示要忽略哪些过滤器的位掩码。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Per-tuple filter bitmaps from a CrossFilter transform.
ast.target: 来自 CrossFilter 变换的逐元组过滤器位图。

ast.name: warning
ast.source: Channel order is inappropriate for nominal field, which has no inherent order.
ast.target: 通道顺序对于名义字段不合适，因为它没有固有顺序。
